CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR);
BEGIN; INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (5, 'test5'); CHECKPOINT;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, description VARCHAR);
BEGIN; INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (3, 'desc3'); CHECKPOINT;
CREATE TABLE combined_table AS SELECT t.id, t.value, a.description FROM test_table t JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.id;
CREATE TABLE memory_table (id INT, data VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table;
DELETE FROM temp_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE 'test%');
